id.title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
id.description: Menganalisis kebutuhan bisnis, mendesain database relasional, membuat wireframe UI/UX dan interactive prototype menggunakan Figma, serta mengimplementasikan solusi frontend dan backend untuk aplikasi bisnis berbasis web.

list.title: Tanggung Jawab Utama:
items: Mengembangkan fitur frontend dan backend menggunakan Laravel dan MySQL.
Mendesain struktur database relasional dan dokumentasi project.
Membuat wireframe UI/UX dan clickable prototype menggunakan Figma.
Berkolaborasi dengan tim untuk menganalisis kebutuhan bisnis dan memberikan solusi teknis.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
en.description: Analyzed business requirements, designed relational databases, created UI/UX wireframes and interactive prototypes using Figma, and implemented frontend and backend solutions for web-based business applications.

list.title: Key Responsibilities:
items: Developed frontend and backend application features using Laravel and MySQL.
Designed relational database structures and project documentation.
Created UI/UX wireframes and clickable prototypes using Figma.
Collaborated with teams to analyze business requirements and deliver technical solutions.

id.title: Full-Stack Developer
id.description: Mengembangkan dan memelihara aplikasi web dan mobile end-to-end yang mencakup sistem frontend dan backend, integrasi API, manajemen database, serta deployment workflow untuk berbagai solusi enterprise dan client.

list.title: Tanggung Jawab Utama:
items: Membangun aplikasi enterprise menggunakan Vue.js, React.js, Laravel, dan FastAPI.
Melakukan integrasi API, database, dan third-party enterprise services.
Mengoptimalkan performa aplikasi dan menjaga scalability sistem.
Mengerjakan platform webinar, visitor management system, dan aplikasi POS berbasis Android.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer
en.description: Developed and maintained end-to-end web and mobile applications, covering frontend and backend systems, API integrations, database management, and deployment workflows for enterprise and client-based solutions.

list.title: Key Responsibilities:
items: Built enterprise applications using Vue.js, React.js, Laravel, and FastAPI.
Integrated APIs, databases, and third-party enterprise services.
Optimized application performance and maintained scalable architectures.
Worked on webinar platforms, visitor management systems, and Android-based POS applications.

id.title: Full-Stack Developer
id.description: Bertanggung jawab dalam membangun dan memelihara aplikasi enterprise untuk sistem manufacturing di TMMIN (Toyota Motor Manufacturing Indonesia). Terlibat dalam pengembangan frontend dan backend, integrasi API, pengolahan data, optimasi sistem, serta deployment ke production environment menggunakan arsitektur microservices dan workflow CI/CD.

list.title: Tanggung Jawab Utama:
items: Mengembangkan aplikasi enterprise berbasis web dan desktop menggunakan Vue.js, Express.js.
Membangun dan memelihara REST API dan ERP manufacturing system.
Mengelola deployment workflow dan infrastruktur menggunakan Docker, Kubernetes.
Melakukan integrasi antar sistem enterprise, optimasi performa aplikasi, serta memastikan reliability, scalability, dan maintainability sistem production.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer
en.description: Responsible for building and maintaining enterprise applications for manufacturing systems at TMMIN (Toyota Motor Manufacturing Indonesia). Involved in frontend and backend development, API integration, data processing, system optimization, and production deployments using microservices architecture and CI/CD workflows.

list.title: Key Responsibilities:
items: Developed enterprise web and desktop applications using Vue.js, Express.js.
Built and maintained REST APIs and ERP manufacturing systems.
Managed deployment workflows and infrastructure using Docker, Kubernetes.
Integrated enterprise systems, optimized application performance, and ensured production system reliability, scalability, and maintainability.

id.title: Full-Stack Developer
id.description: Bertanggung jawab dalam membangun dan memelihara aplikasi enterprise untuk sistem manufacturing, logistics tracking, dan data warehouse di TMMIN (Toyota Motor Manufacturing Indonesia). Terlibat dalam pengembangan frontend dan backend, integrasi API, pengolahan data, optimasi sistem, serta deployment ke production environment menggunakan arsitektur microservices dan workflow CI/CD.

list.title: Tanggung Jawab Utama:
items: Mengembangkan aplikasi enterprise berbasis web dan desktop menggunakan React.js, Express.js, ASP.NET, dan C# WinForms.
Membangun dan memelihara REST API, GPS tracking system, ERP manufacturing system, dan data warehouse platform berbasis Vehicle ID (VIN).
Mengelola deployment workflow dan infrastruktur menggunakan Docker, Kubernetes, Apache Kafka, Apache NiFi, dan Apache Airflow.
Melakukan integrasi antar sistem enterprise, optimasi performa aplikasi, serta memastikan reliability, scalability, dan maintainability sistem production.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer
en.description: Responsible for building and maintaining enterprise applications for manufacturing systems, logistics tracking, and data warehouse platforms at TMMIN (Toyota Motor Manufacturing Indonesia). Involved in frontend and backend development, API integration, data processing, system optimization, and production deployments using microservices architecture and CI/CD workflows.

list.title: Key Responsibilities:
items: Developed enterprise web and desktop applications using React.js, Express.js, ASP.NET, and C# WinForms.
Built and maintained REST APIs, GPS tracking systems, ERP manufacturing systems, and Vehicle ID (VIN)-based data warehouse platforms.
Managed deployment workflows and infrastructure using Docker, Kubernetes, Apache Kafka, Apache NiFi, and Apache Airflow.
Integrated enterprise systems, optimized application performance, and ensured production system reliability, scalability, and maintainability.
